Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only. gs.info("INPUT VALUE: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // DEFAULT OUTPUTS outputs.quote_created = false; outputs.quote_number = ""; outputs.pdf_generated = false; outputs.approval_status = ""; outputs.stage = ""; outputs._action_status = 'null'; // DEBUG INPUT gs.info("INPUT OPP: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // ============================================================ // STEP 1 — Fetch Opportunity and extract SYS_ID // ============================================================ var oppGR = new GlideRecord('sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity'); oppGR.addQuery('number', inputs.opportunity_number); oppGR.setLimit(1); oppGR.query(); if (oppGR.next()) { gs.info("OPP FOUND: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // ✅ FIX: Capture the sys_id of the Opportunity var oppSysId = oppGR.getUniqueValue(); gs.info("OPP SYS_ID: " + oppSysId); // ============================================================ // STEP 2 — Fetch Quote using SYS_ID (not the display number) // ============================================================ var quoteGR = new GlideRecord('sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote'); quoteGR.addQuery('source_opportunity', oppSysId); // ✅ FIX: Use sys_id here quoteGR.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); quoteGR.setLimit(1); quoteGR.query(); if (quoteGR.next()) { gs.info("QUOTE FOUND: " + quoteGR.getValue('number')); outputs.quote_created = true; outputs.quote_number = quoteGR.getValue('number') || ""; outputs.stage = quoteGR.getDisplayValue('state') || ""; outputs.approval_status = quoteGR.getDisplayValue('approval') || ""; // ============================================================ // STEP 3 — Check for PDF Attachment on the Quote // ============================================================ var attachGR = new GlideRecord('sys_attachment'); attachGR.addQuery('table_sys_id', quoteGR.getUniqueValue()); // ✅ sys_id of the quote attachGR.addQuery('content_type', 'application/pdf'); // ✅ Filter to PDF only attachGR.query(); outputs.pdf_generated = attachGR.hasNext(); gs.info("QUOTE NUMBER : " + outputs.quote_number); gs.info("STAGE : " + outputs.stage); gs.info("APPROVAL STATUS : " + outputs.approval_status); gs.info("PDF GENERATED : " + outputs.pdf_generated); } else { gs.info("NO QUOTE FOUND FOR OPPORTUNITY: " + inputs.opportunity_number); } } else { gs.info("OPPORTUNITY NOT FOUND: " + inputs.opportunity_number); } // REQUIRED FOR ACTION outputs._action_status = { code: 0, message: 11:01:479c9bb1c53b5c835075e10964c3e45a3916bandganesh2026-04-20 10:31:22// Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only. gs.info("INPUT VALUE: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // DEFAULT OUTPUTS outputs.quote_created = false; outputs.quote_number = ""; outputs.pdf_generated = false; outputs.approval_status = ""; outputs.stage = ""; outputs._action_status = 'null'; // DEBUG INPUT gs.info("INPUT OPP: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // ============================================================ // STEP 1 — Fetch Opportunity and extract SYS_ID // ============================================================ var oppGR = new GlideRecord('sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity'); oppGR.addQuery('number', inputs.opportunity_number); oppGR.setLimit(1); oppGR.query(); if (oppGR.next()) { gs.info("OPP FOUND: " + inputs.opportunity_number); // ✅ FIX: Capture the sys_id of the Opportunity var oppSysId = oppGR.getUniqueValue(); gs.info("OPP SYS_ID: " + oppSysId); // ============================================================ // STEP 2 — Fetch Quote using SYS_ID (not the display number) // ============================================================ var quoteGR = new GlideRecord('sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote'); quoteGR.addQuery('source_opportunity', oppSysId); // ✅ FIX: Use sys_id here quoteGR.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); quoteGR.setLimit(1); quoteGR.query(); if (quoteGR.next()) { gs.info("QUOTE FOUND: " + quoteGR.getValue('number')); outputs.quote_created = true; outputs.quote_number = quoteGR.getValue('number') || ""; outputs.stage = quoteGR.getDisplayValue('state') || ""; outputs.approval_status = quoteGR.getDisplayValue('approval') || ""; // ============================================================ // STEP 3 — Check for PDF Attachment on the Quote // ============================================================ var attachGR = new GlideRecord('sys_attachment'); attachGR.addQuery('table_sys_id', quoteGR.getUniqueValue()); // ✅ sys_id of the quote attachGR.addQuery('content_type', 'application/pdf'); // ✅ Filter to PDF only attachGR.query(); outputs.pdf_generated = attachGR.hasNext(); gs.info("QUOTE NUMBER : " + outputs.quote_number); gs.info("STAGE : " + outputs.stage); gs.info("APPROVAL STATUS : " + outputs.approval_status); gs.info("PDF GENERATED : " + outputs.pdf_generated); } else { gs.info("NO QUOTE FOUND FOR OPPORTUNITY: " + inputs.opportunity_number); } } else { gs.info("OPPORTUNITY NOT FOUND: " + inputs.opportunity_number); } // REQUIRED FOR ACTION outputs._action_status = { code: 0, message: "Success" }; 12:05:45</sys_updated_on><value>// Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only.

(function execute(inputs, outputs) {

    // ============================================================
    // TABLE
    // ============================================================
    var OPTY_TABLE = 'sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity';

    // ============================================================
    // DEFAULT OUTPUTS — safe fallback values
    // ============================================================
    outputs.opportunity_found = false;
    outputs.oppty_sys_id      = '';
    outputs.oppty_number_out  = '';
    outputs.account_name      = '';
    outputs.opportunity_name  = '';
    outputs.sales_stage       = '';
    outputs.state             = '';
    outputs.error_message     = '';

    gs.info('====================================================');
    gs.info(' ACTION START: Get Opportunity Information');
    gs.info('====================================================');

    // ============================================================
    // STEP 1 — Validate Input
    // ============================================================
    gs.info('STEP 1: Validating input...');

    if (!inputs.oppty_number || inputs.oppty_number.trim() === '') {
        gs.info('❌ INPUT ERROR: Opportunity number is empty or missing.');
        outputs.opportunity_found = false;
        outputs.error_message     = 'Opportunity number was not provided. Please provide a valid opportunity number.';
        return;
    }

    var opptyNumber = inputs.oppty_number.trim().toUpperCase();
    gs.info('   ➡️  Searching for Opportunity : ' + opptyNumber);

    // ============================================================
    // STEP 2 — Query Opportunity Table
    // ============================================================
    gs.info('----------------------------------------------------');
    gs.info('STEP 2: Querying ' + OPTY_TABLE + '...');

    var oppty_gr = new GlideRecord(OPTY_TABLE);
    oppty_gr.addQuery('number', opptyNumber);
    oppty_gr.query();

    // ============================================================
    // STEP 3 — Handle Result
    // ============================================================
    if (!oppty_gr.next()) {

        // --------------------------------------------------------
        // NOT FOUND — Set outputs to stop further processing
        // --------------------------------------------------------
        gs.info('❌ OPPORTUNITY NOT FOUND: ' + opptyNumber);

        outputs.opportunity_found = false;
        outputs.error_message     = 'Opportunity ' + opptyNumber + ' was not found. Please check the number and try again.';

        gs.info('   ➡️  opportunity_found : false');
        gs.info('   ➡️  error_message     : ' + outputs.error_message);

    } else {

        // --------------------------------------------------------
        // FOUND — Populate all output variables
        // --------------------------------------------------------
        gs.info('✅ OPPORTUNITY FOUND!');

        outputs.opportunity_found = true;
        outputs.oppty_sys_id      = oppty_gr.getUniqueValue();
        outputs.oppty_number_out  = oppty_gr.getValue('number')            || '';
        outputs.account_name      = oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('account')    || '';
        outputs.opportunity_name  = oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('short_description') || 
                                    oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('name')       || '';
        outputs.sales_stage       = oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('sales_stage')|| '';
        outputs.state             = oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('state')      || '';
        outputs.error_message     = '';

        gs.info('   ➡️  opportunity_found : true');
        gs.info('   ➡️  oppty_sys_id      : ' + outputs.oppty_sys_id);
        gs.info('   ➡️  oppty_number_out  : ' + outputs.oppty_number_out);
        gs.info('   ➡️  account_name      : ' + outputs.account_name);
        gs.info('   ➡️  opportunity_name  : ' + outputs.opportunity_name);
        gs.info('   ➡️  sales_stage       : ' + outputs.sales_stage);
        gs.info('   ➡️  state             : ' + outputs.state);
    }

    gs.info('====================================================');
    gs.info(' ACTION COMPLETE: Get Opportunity Information');
    gs.info('====================================================');

})(inputs, outputs);
</value><variable display_value="Script">71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719b</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>4750a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f22e</document_key><order>400</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-03-07 06:53:09</sys_created_on><sys_id>df50a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f23a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-03-07 06:53:09</sys_updated_on><value>35aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375</value><variable display_value="MID Application">f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_hub_step_ext_input_4750a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f22e^id=4750a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f22e"/><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7^id=4750a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f22e"/><sys_hub_step_ext_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=4750a88b43c46210d089d83cdfb8f22e^sys_idNOT INf92afba2eb5043108deef07fbad0cd74"/><sys_hub_step_ext_input action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><array>false</array><array_denormalized>false</array_denormalized><attributes>element_mapping_provider=com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper,uiType=string,uiTypeLabel=String</attributes><audit>false</audit><calculation><![CDATA[(function calculatedFieldValue(current) {
